entity.label: Ahishar
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Brother of song = singer, the officer who was “over the household” of Solomon (1 Kings 4:6).

nodes.label: Ahishar
nodes.description: Brother of song = singer, the officer who was “over the household” of Solomon (1 Kings 4:6).

verses.text: And Ahishar was over the household: and Adoniram the son of Abda was over the tribute.
